GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  Z:(0,1/2,0)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)E1+E2+  (R)E1-E2-  (R)E3E4  (R)E5E6  (S)C1-C1+  (S)C2-C2+  (S)C4C6  (S)C3C5  (T)A1+A2-  (T)A1-A2+  (T)A4A5  (T)A3A6  (U)D1+D2+  (U)D1-D2-  (U)D3D4  (U)D5D6  (X)Z1-Z1+  (X)Z2-Z2+  (X)Z4Z6  (X)Z3Z5  Y1+  Y1-  Y2+  Y2-  Y4  Y6  Y3  Y5  (Z)B1+B2-  (Z)B1-B2+  (Z)B4B5  (Z)B3B6
